notifications.title: Welcome
notifications.message: Welcome to the demo.

notifications.title: Step 2 of 3: Schedule checked for Lila Santos
notifications.message: Staff reviewed the requested date and matched it to a lawyer schedule. This example is shown for Lila Santos so the demo is easy to explain.
